({RAWSTMT :stmt_location 0 :stmt_len 88
  :stmt {SELECT :star true
    :from {ALIASED :source {CONTAINER :name "employees" :loc_start 22 :loc_end 31} :alias "e" :loc_start 22 :loc_end 33}
    :where {BINEXPR :op "AND" :left {BINEXPR :op "=" :left {BRACKET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "e" :loc_start 44 :loc_end 45} :property "addresses" :loc_start 44 :loc_end 55} :index {NUMLIT :val "1" :loc_start 56 :loc_end 57} :loc_start 44 :loc_end 58} :right {STRLIT :val "1234 Main St" :loc_start 61 :loc_end 73} :loc_start 44 :loc_end 73} :right {BINEXPR :op ">>" :left {NUMLIT :val "100" :loc_start 80 :loc_end 83} :right {NUMLIT :val "2" :loc_start 87 :loc_end 88} :loc_start 80 :loc_end 88} :loc_start 44 :loc_end 88} :loc_start 0 :loc_end 88}})
